nasb.text: As fire kindles the brushwood, as fire causes water to boil— To make Your name known to Your adversaries, That the nations may tremble at Your presence!

esv.text: as when fire kindles brushwood and the fire causes water to boil— to make your name known to your adversaries, and that the nations might tremble at your presence!

cnv.text: 好像火燒著乾柴，又像火把水燒開， 使你的敵人認識你的名， 使列國在你面前發顫。

ccb.text: 求你使敌人认识你的威名， 使列国在你面前颤抖， 如火烧干柴使水沸腾。

csbs.text: ——如火点燃干柴， 又如火将水烧开—— 好使你的敌人认识你的名， 使列国在你面前颤抖。
